description_long: This is a compact, rectangular action camera with a rugged, matte gray exterior and a prominent lens on the front. The front face features a small monochrome display showing recording status and settings, while the main lens is encased in a protective black bezel. The rear side is dominated by a large, full-color LCD screen displaying a vivid beach scene, with the GoPro logo and status indicators along the edge. The top and sides are smooth, with subtle seams and a few small buttons for control, indicating a waterproof and impact-resistant design. The overall build suggests durability and portability, suitable for outdoor and urban environments. The object is likely constructed from high-strength plastic with internal electronic components and a rechargeable battery.
description: A rugged, compact action camera with a large rear LCD screen, prominent front lens, and durable gray casing. Features include a front status display and side control buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main lens, a small monochrome status display, and part of the rugged casing.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the camera's depth, smooth surface, and subtle seams, with no visible controls or screens.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by a large color LCD screen displaying a beach scene, with the GoPro logo and status indicators.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the camera's thickness and smooth, uninterrupted casing.
